refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key analysis components (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) to ensure clarity and verifiability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain features, detected obstacles, and clearly marked work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm to generate terrain and obstacle maps.
DP3: Use GIS-based work-zone modeling with dynamic update capability.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 + DP2 + DP3 combined as an integrated worksite mapping subsystem.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle mapping algorithms.
Integration of GIS work-zone modeling with sensor data.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but modular enough to allow clear interface definitions and manageable integration.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of data processing latency impacting real-time updates.
Risk of incomplete obstacle detection in adverse weather.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor sensor data quality and processing performance; consider fallback strategies for degraded sensor inputs.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized worksite mapping and modeling subsystem integrating sensor data processing and GIS work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle and other sources.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides processed worksite maps and models to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the mapping logic and data processing are centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; high diffusion if mapping logic placed here.
Not suitable for mapping processing; would cause high diffusion and poor containment.
Safety Services may consume mapping data but should not contain mapping logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized.
Risk of module becoming too large and complex.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing internal components within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and performance.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well-defined and the selected DPs logically satisfy the requirements with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to centralized mapping logic in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment; interfaces are well-defined and consistent with known interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated mapping subsystem outputs against ground truth and sensor inputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functionality to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor performance and complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Plan for fallback or redundancy in sensor data processing.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and constraints with acceptable risk and clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent designated work zones within the worksite.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sufficient processing capability in NGHE Solution module.
open_risks: Sensor data degradation in adverse conditions.
